childElements.description: This list action will update the CPA with newly created PNC Ids
childElements.name: LA_UpdateCPAWithNewPNC
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "providerNetworkContractList", "matchingPath" : "Cloned_From__c", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "DE_FetchCPAAndPCARecords:contractPaymentAgreementRec", "matchingPath" : "Provider_Network_Contract__c", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : true, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DE_FetchCPAAndPCARecords:contractPaymentAgreementRec", "providerNetworkContractList" ], "filterListFormula" : "= AgreementType != $Vlocity.NULL", "dynamicOutputFields" : "SV_SetReturnFields:contractPaymentAgreementFields", "updateFieldValue" : { "ProviderNetworkId" : "=Id", "Name" : "=Name +' '+ FORMATDATETIME($Vlocity.NOW,\"yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ\",\"America/Mexico_City\")" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
